title: stachys albens
intro: Stachys albens, also known as the White Betony, is a perennial plant native to Europe and parts of Asia, belonging to the mint family (Lamiaceae). The plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, making it effective in treating wounds, fever, and digestive issues. The health benefits of Stachys albens include its ability to calm the nervous system, reduce anxiety and stress, and promote a good night's sleep. The plant can be prepared as a tea, tincture, or infusion, and it is also used in herbal preparations such as salves and ointments to promote wound healing and soothe skin irritations.
